message.title: Valid title
body: This is an extremely long message that exceeds the maximum allowed length of 256 characters per body element. This message continues to provide enough text to reach and exceed that limit so that the validation should fail. Adding more text here to ensure we definitely cross the 256 character threshold for this test case to properly validate the length restriction.

test-cases.goal: Total body JSON serialized exceeds 10000 characters
